items.raw_excerpt: MONTREAL — A small town west of Montreal has decided to officially recognize trees as living beings with rights of their own, in what an environmental organization describes as a first in Quebec and Canada. A resolution adopted by Terrasse-Vaudreuil city council on June 9 declares that trees are worthy of protection, “including the right […]
items.summary_en: A small town near Montreal now says trees are living beings with rights. The town council voted to protect trees, including the right to exist and grow. It is the first town in Quebec and Canada to do this.
items.summary_ko: 몬트리올 근처의 작은 마을이 나무를 권리를 가진 살아있는 존재로 공식 인정했다. 마을 의회는 나무가 존재하고 자랄 권리를 포함한 보호를 받을 자격이 있다고 결정했다. 퀘벡과 캐나다에서 처음 있는 일이다.
items.title_en: Small Quebec town recognizes trees as living beings with rights
items.title_ko: 퀘벡의 작은 마을, 나무를 권리를 가진 생명체로 인정하다
items.title_original: Quebec town of Terrasse-Vaudreuil recognizes trees as living beings with rights - CityNews Halifax

items.raw_excerpt: Shepparton (including Mooroopna) is a major rural centre in the Goulburn Valley.
items.summary_en: Shepparton is a major rural center in the Goulburn Valley, Victoria. This travel guide covers things to do in Shepparton and nearby Mooroopna.
items.summary_ko: 셰퍼튼은 빅토리아주 굴번 밸리의 주요 농촌 중심지입니다. 이 가이드는 셰퍼튼과 인근 무룹나에서 즐길 거리를 소개합니다.
items.title_en: Shepparton, Victoria travel guide and things to do
items.title_ko: 빅토리아주 셰퍼튼: 여행 가이드 & 즐길 거리
items.title_original: Shepparton, Victoria: Travel guide and things to do - The Age
